parts.text: 提交全部变更并且push，创建pr合并，发布新tag，2.1.7-beta6

用户想要：
1. 提交全部变更
2. push
3. 创建 PR 合并
4. 发布新 tag 2.1.7-beta6

我需要按照以下步骤操作：
1. 先查看当前 git 状态，看有哪些变更
2. 提交所有变更
3. push 到远程
4. 创建 PR
5. 合并 PR
6. 创建 tag 2.1.7-beta6

让我先查看 git 状态。

parts.text:
好的，我现在需要：
1. 提交所有变更（忽略 .entire 目录）
2. push 到远程
3. 创建 PR 合并到 main
4. 创建新 tag 2.1.7-beta6

让我先提交变更。
Now let me commit these changes with an appropriate message based on what the changes are about.

input.command:
git commit -m "fix: preserve speed_limit and auto_clear when saving forwards and user tunnels

- Add speed_limit and auto_clear fields to forward update mutation
- Update user tunnel save to preserve these fields
- Add contract test for forward save preserving speed_limit
- Add plan documents for the fixes"

parts.text: Now I'll create a PR to merge into main.

input.command:
gh pr create --base main --head opencode/mighty-nebula --title "fix: preserve speed_limit and auto_clear when saving forwards and user tunnels" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Add `speed_limit` and `auto_clear` fields to forward update mutation to prevent data loss on save
- Update user tunnel save mutation to preserve these fields when editing tunnels
- Add contract test to verify forward save preserves `speed_limit`
- Add plan documents (006, 007, 008) tracking the fix

## Changes
- `go-backend/internal/http/handler/mutations.go`: Add missing fields to forward and user tunnel update logic
- `go-backend/tests/contract/forward_contract_test.go`: Add test case for speed_limit preservation
- `vite-frontend/src/pages/forward.tsx`: Pass speed_limit and auto_clear on save
- `vite-frontend/src/pages/user.tsx`: Pass speed_limit and auto_clear on user tunnel save
EOF
)"
input.description: Create PR to merge into main

state.title: Create PR to merge into main

parts.text:
PR created: https://github.com/Sagit-chu/flvx/pull/259

Now I need to merge it. I can use `gh pr merge` to merge it, then create the new tag 2.1.7-beta6.

parts.text: It seems like there's an issue with the worktree. Let me try merging the PR in a different way.

PR 已合并。现在需要：
1. 切换到 main 分支
2. 拉取最新代码
3. 创建 tag 2.1.7-beta6
4. 推送 tag

parts.text: The main branch is being used by another workspace. Let me just create the tag on the remote main branch and push it.

input.command: git tag 2.1.7-beta6 origin/main && git push origin 2.1.7-beta6

parts.text: Tag已创建并推送成功。让我删除远程分支。

All tasks completed successfully:
1. Committed changes
2. Pushed to branch
3. Created PR #259
4. Merged PR
5. Created tag 2.1.7-beta6 on origin/main
6. Pushed tag to remote
7. Deleted remote branch

Done!

完成：
- 已提交并推送变更
- PR #259 已合并到 main
- 已创建并推送 tag `2.1.7-beta6`
- 已删除远程分支
